title: TB_diagnosis_patient:5037
treatment_protocol_ch1: Tuberculosis patients, samples taken at beginning and end of conventional combination therapy (2HRZE/4HR)
growth_protocol_ch1: Ex vivo human blood, 5ml mixed in 50ml RNA/DNA Stabilization reagent (Roche Applied Science)
extract_protocol_ch1: mRNA Isolation Kit for Blood/Bone Marrow (Roche Applied Science) and Turbo DNA-free™ treatment (Ambion: Applied Biosystems)
label_protocol_ch1: 3 ng mRNA processed using NuGEN Ovation® Whole Blood Solution
hyb_protocol: Fragmented and biotinylated cDNA was hybridised to Human U133 Plus 2.0 Affymetrix GeneChips at 45C, 60 rpm for 18 hours. GeneChips were washed and stained with an Affymetrix GeneChip Fluidics station 450, protocol EukGE-WS2v4_450.
data_processing: GC-RMA summarised and baseline normalised to median of all arrays using GeneSpring GX11.5
contact_institute: London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine
